meta.title: Can Boeing really build the best stealth fighter in the world?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Thanks to Rodrigo Avella for letting us use his incredible artwork in our thumbnail! Make sure to check out rodrigoavella.com, or follow him on Instagram to see more incredible art! 
https://www.instagram.com/rodrigo.avella

On March 21, 2025, the United States Air Force announced that Boeing would be the prime contractor on America’s next stealth air superiority fighter, officially designated the F-47. This new aircraft, which the Pentagon has touted as the world’s first 6th-generation fighter, is meant to replace the legendary F-22 Raptor. 

But does Boeing really have what it takes to make it happen? Let's discuss.
